---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? What's the user pain? -->
<!-- Be specific: "Operator has to manually edit rw-eap.conf after every customer rotation" -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What do you want to see? Sketch the interface / API / UI if applicable. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other ways you considered solving this. Why is the proposed one better? -->

## Impact

- **Customers affected**: <!-- all / some / one / none (operator-only) -->
- **Effort estimate**: <!-- S (< 1h) / M (1-4h) / L (4-16h) / XL (> 16h) -->
- **Priority**: <!-- P0 (blocker) / P1 (next sprint) / P2 (next quarter) / P3 (someday) -->
- **Risk**: <!-- Low (additive, isolated) / Med (touches shared code) / High (changes auth/quota path) -->

## Dependencies

<!-- Does this require: -->
<!-- - New Python deps (pip install)? -->
<!-- - New OS packages (apt install)? -->
<!-- - Changes to nginx / systemd / docker config? -->
<!-- - Schema migration? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How do we know it's done? Bullet list. -->

- [ ] <!-- Criterion 1 -->
- [ ] <!-- Criterion 2 -->
- [ ] <!-- Criterion 3 -->

## Out of Scope

<!-- What this feature explicitly does NOT include. Prevents scope creep. -->

## Related

<!-- Links to related issues, PRs, ROADMAP entries, tracker rows. -->
